required_outputs.description: Launch-quality descriptor analysis notebook with packet-only calculations, validation checks, audit table, multicollinearity and sensitivity analyses, and final recommendation table with needs_review flags.
Prioritized experiment plan with budget allocation against decision_budget_usd, stopping criteria, and data-driven recommendation-updating logic.
